qa_pairs.question: How do users initiate a file transfer within the Globus portal?
qa_pairs.answer: To initiate a file transfer in the Globus portal, users should single-click on the file or directory they wish to transfer (or Control-click to select multiple items), and then click on one of the large blue buttons with white arrowheads.

qa_pairs.question: After initiating a file transfer in Globus, how are users notified of its completion and how can they track its progress?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a transfer is initiated in Globus, it is assigned a unique ID and begins immediately. Users will receive an email notification when the transfer is complete. To monitor transfers in progress or view details of completed transfers, users can click the "Activity" button on the left side of the Globus portal.
